extras.title: 同根词 historical, historic
extras.content: historical:历史的,修饰的人或事都是过去的真人真事 historic:具有重大历史意义的,用来修饰一些重大的、有特殊历史意义的人或事
表达“学到、获得知识”要用 acquire/gain knowledge,而不应说成 learn knowledge。
该词的前面通常要用 can 或 be able to。

senses.def_en: to come near to sb. or sth. in distance or time
senses.example: As the TEM-4 approaches, I become nervous. // As they approached the wood a rabbit ran out of the trees.
senses.example_zh: 随着英语专业四级考试的来临，我变得紧张起来。// 他们走近树林的时候，一只兔子从树林里跑了出来。

senses.example: the approach of night
senses.example_zh: 夜幕降临

senses.example: You seem to have a good approach to the problem.
senses.example_zh: 你好像有解决该问题的好办法。

entries.mnemonic: ac(to)+quire(追求)→不断追求才能获得→获得

senses.example: To acquire great success, you must work hard.
senses.example_zh: 要获得成功，必须努力。

senses.example: He spent years acquiring his skills as a surgeon.
senses.example_zh: 他花了几年时间学到了外科技术。

senses.example: Students ought to devote their time to the acquisition of knowledge.
senses.example_zh: 学生们应该把时间都花在求知上。

senses.example: This painting is my latest acquisition.
senses.example_zh: 这幅画是我最近得到的。

senses.example: Most university graduates consider white-collared positions as decent jobs.
senses.example_zh: 绝大多数大学毕业生都认为白领是体面的工作。

senses.example: a decent old man
senses.example_zh: 一位宽厚的老人

senses.example: decent language and behavior
senses.example_zh: 得体的谈吐和行为

senses.example: It's not respectable to be drunk on the street.
senses.example_zh: 在大街上醉倒是不体面的。

senses.example: Her exam results were respectable, although not brilliant.
senses.example_zh: 她的考试成绩不错，尽管并不优秀。

senses.def_zh: 令人赞叹的，令人钦佩的
senses.example: This essay is admirable in all respects.
senses.example_zh: 这篇文章在各方面都很值得欣赏。

senses.example: Nothing will dispel enthusiasm like a small admission fee.
senses.example_zh: 没有什么能像小小的会费一样令人热情顿失的了。

senses.example: individual tuition
senses.example_zh: 个别讲授

senses.def_en: a fee for instruction, esp. at a university, private school
senses.example: The tuition of higher education in the US is much higher than that in China.
senses.example_zh: 美国高校的学费比中国要高许多。

senses.def_zh: 有足够的时间(金钱)去(做某事)
senses.example: The firm could not afford to pay such large salaries.
senses.example_zh: 公司无法支付如此巨额的工资。

derivatives: affordable a. 买得起的;担得起…风险的

senses.example: The payment of the goods is payable in installments.
senses.example_zh: 货款可以分期支付。

senses.example: Payment may be made by credit card.
senses.example_zh: 付款可用信用卡。

senses.example: Food, clothing, shelter and transportation are essential to life.
senses.example_zh: 衣、食、住、行是生活中必不可少的。

senses.example: What is the essential difference between the market economy and the planned economy?
senses.example_zh: 市场经济和计划经济的本质区别是什么？
